key.name: show-memory-in-panel
key.summary: Show memory use in the top bar
key.description: Show current memory use in the panel indicator.

key.name: show-temperature-in-panel
key.summary: Show temperature in the top bar
key.description: Show the hottest available temperature sensor in the panel indicator.

key.name: show-fan-in-panel
key.summary: Show fan speed in the top bar
key.description: Show Fan 1 speed in the panel indicator while the fan is running.

key.name: show-system-filesystem-in-panel
key.summary: Show system filesystem use in the top bar
key.description: Show usage for the filesystem mounted at the root path in the panel indicator.

key.name: show-work-filesystem-in-panel
key.summary: Show Work SSD use in the top bar
key.description: Show usage for the mounted Work filesystem in the panel indicator.

key.name: sensor-history-enabled
key.description: Write timestamped system sensor snapshots to daily log files.

key.name: sensor-history-retention-days
key.description: Number of selected time units of sensor history to retain.

key.name: sensor-history-retention-unit
key.description: Time unit used by the sensor history retention length.
